title: DURA Learner Record — LFLRS-1.0 Canonical Wire Format
description: The canonical, portable shape of a DURA learner record. This is the WIRE / EXPORT / SYNC format, not the in-browser storage shape. DURA's IndexedDB stores records in a compact internal shape (camelCase, epoch ms, string-enum ratings); projection functions in src/lib/learner-record/types.ts convert between stored and canonical at every external boundary (Supabase sync, learner export, xAPI emission). Per ADR — keeping the storage shape stable while making the wire format LFLRS-1.0 conformant avoids a destructive live-data migration. CRDT semantics are enforced by the merge code in src/lib/supabase/sync.ts (G-Set for review_log, LWW-Register for cards/mastery), not by per-record tags — adding _crdt fields to every record bloats storage with no behavioral value.

schema_version.description: Pinned to the LFLRS standard version this record conforms to.

learner_id.description: Local anonymous UUID. NEVER an email, name, or Supabase auth UID. Generated once at first launch and stored client-side.

exported_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this canonical record was assembled.

cards.description: FSRS cards. CRDT type: LWW-Register per field — sync merges field-by-field by latest _last_modified, never object-replaces. Enforced by mergeCard() in src/lib/supabase/sync.ts.

review_log.description: FSRS review history. CRDT type: G-Set (grow-only set) — entries are append-only. Once written, a review log entry is never updated or deleted. Enforced by mergeReviewLog() in src/lib/supabase/sync.ts.

mastery_records.description: Module-level mastery transitions. CRDT type: LWW-Register per field, with the additional invariant that mastery_score is monotonically increasing — a sync that would lower a learner's mastery_score is rejected. Enforced by mergeMastery() in src/lib/supabase/sync.ts.

FSRSState.description: FSRS-5 card lifecycle state. Canonical TitleCase. DURA's internal storage uses lowercase; projection capitalizes.

last_modified.description: Timestamp used as the LWW-Register tiebreaker during sync merge.

ReviewLogEntry.description: G-Set element — never updated, never deleted after first write. The combination of (id) is the set membership key.

rating.description: 1=again, 2=hard, 3=good, 4=easy. Canonical integer form. DURA's internal storage uses string enum; projection maps.

mastery_score.description: 0..1 fraction. Monotonically increasing — sync rejects merges that would lower this value.

unlocked_at.description: First time mastery_score crossed the unlock threshold; null until threshold reached.
